Sword of Rile  
 

Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Slashing Atk Delay: 40
DMG: 34 Dmg Bonus: 142
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +10 DEX: +5 STA: +5 CHA: +5 WIS: +10 INT: +10 HP: +50
Effect: Steelskin (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 40
WT: 2.0 Size: LARGE
Class: WAR PAL RNG SHD BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Rarity: Ultra Rare

You are obviously a newbie, in relative terms. I mean this not as a flame, but as point of fact; you say "this item sucks," but you forget that this sword went live with KUNARK. I suspect you started playing the game sometime well after Kunark's release...? Or perhaps you simply don't remember the weapons you wielded in that era, if indeed you are a seadoned player.

Regardless, in it's day this weapon was excellent.

▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Nov 26 2001 at 8:04 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Guess What class this sword will almost always go to.
RE: Guess What
QuoteReply
# Feb 11 2002 at 1:46 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592758301698
Scholar
26 posts
Just wanted to address a few things...

"SKs really have better weapons than this, but i could understand why they would want this, afterall, it is a nice weapon. But their Epic is a little bit better than this and yet again, most classes have their epics by 55+."

SK's really don't have much better weapons than this that I know of anyways, at least prior to ToV and ST loot; if you can think of any specific examples of better weapons that would be considered SK only and not be useable by pallies as well, I'd be happy to look them up. Also, I don't know one SK that is level 55 on my server that has their epic. The SK epic is a bish to obtain and to be truthful I personally only have knowledge of 2 Shadow Knights on my entire server (both level 60) who have their epics. Right now at level 52, I am using an argent defender (33 49 2hs with no stats) and I would gladly take this as an upgrade, especially with the int bonus, as we are casters too and we need more mana just as much as any other caster/hybrid class. Even the claidhmores from Dragon Necropolis that I have been looking for for some time are similar to this ratio-wise, but don't have the stat bonuses that make this a nice sword, let alone the proc.

"Also, 2handers were MADE for Paladins."
I know a LOT of people who tell me as an SK that 2 hand weapons should be my primary focus. The SK epic is a 2hs. We cannot dual wield either, and we basically share a lot of the endgame weapons with pallies. Although there are still many SK's who would prefer a nice shield and a one handed weapon, I know a massive amount of SK's that use 2 handers regularly for damage output. So 2 handers were not made exclusively for the paladin class.

Bottom line... just trying to show that this weapon would benefit a Shadow Knight just as much as it would a Paladin, so there's no need to really say it would be more useful to a pally.

Akronis Kutskira
52 Reaver of Epic Shadows
▲ Page top
RE: Guess What
QuoteReply
# Jul 17 2004 at 7:20 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591753934230
215 posts
I know the previous posts are over 2 years old, but the fact that I carry Greenmist, a Hammer of the Bloodleacher, and a Greatstaff of Misery (and swap out as needed) says something about how much the game has changed since this weapon first saw the light of day.
